title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Swiggy

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Swiggy
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Swiggy in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Swiggy:
Swiggy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy!
